common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.title: Book your appointment
home.subtitle: Choose a department, a doctor, and an available time slot.

booking.noDepartments: No departments are available right now.
booking.noDoctors: No doctors are available in this department right now.
booking.noSlotsAvailable: No available slots on this day. Please try another date.
booking.phoneOrEmailHint: Please provide at least a phone number or an email address.
booking.notesPlaceholder: Anything the doctor or reception should know
booking.slotTaken: This slot was just taken. Please choose another one.
booking.bookingFailed: We couldn't submit your booking. Please try again.
booking.confirmationPendingMessage: Your appointment request has been received and is pending confirmation from the hospital. You will receive an email once it is confirmed.

login.title: Admin sign-in
login.subtitle: Enter the shared admin password to continue.
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.

requests.title: Pending Requests
requests.confirmEmailFailed: Appointment confirmed, but the confirmation email failed to send. Please contact the patient manually.
requests.noEmailOnFile: No email on file — call the patient
requests.rejectReason: Reason (optional, included in the email if sent)

departments.title: Departments
departments.deleteConfirm: Delete this department? Doctors in it must be removed first.

doctors.title: Doctors
doctors.deleteConfirm: Delete this doctor and all their schedule data?

confirmed.subject: Your appointment is confirmed
confirmed.heading: Appointment Confirmed
confirmed.body: Your appointment has been confirmed. Details are below.
confirmed.footer: If you need to reschedule or cancel, please contact us.

rejected.subject: Update on your appointment request
rejected.heading: Appointment Request Update
rejected.body: Unfortunately, we are unable to confirm your requested appointment at this time.
rejected.footer: Please contact us or submit a new request for another time.
